certificate.permits_boundary:
permits:
  net: { http: ["api.example.com"] }
  exec: true
  tools: ["nika:assert", "nika:date", "nika:emit", "nika:fetch", "nika:notify", "nika:prompt", "nika:wait"]

# review — effects too dynamic to pin statically:
#   · task `tests` uses the shell-string exec form — a program allowlist applies only to the array form; `exec` widened to `true` (rewrite to the array form for a tighter permit)
#   · task `lint` uses the shell-string exec form — a program allowlist applies only to the array form; `exec` widened to `true` (rewrite to the array form for a tighter permit)
#   · task `audit` uses the shell-string exec form — a program allowlist applies only to the array form; `exec` widened to `true` (rewrite to the array form for a tighter permit)
#   · task `ship` uses the shell-string exec form — a program allowlist applies only to the array form; `exec` widened to `true` (rewrite to the array form for a tighter permit)
#   · task `record (on_finally)` reaches a dynamic URL — `net.http` cannot express 'any host'; add the resolved host(s) before running
